================================================================================
# KEY BINDINGS (GSE3 Variables)
# Alt+Click: Spell Lock (interrupt)
# Ctrl+Click: Mortal Coil (utility)  
# Shift+Click: Unending Resolve (defensive)
# Standard: Target enemy + start attack

# PvP Modifiers:
# Alt+Target: Curse of Tongues (casters/healers)
# Ctrl+Target: Curse of Exhaustion (melee)

================================================================================
# ROTATION NOTES
# - Dark Harvest: Cast on CD (Soul Harvester) or before Darkglare (Hellcaller)
# - Agony: Never let fall off in PvP (maintains 18 stacks)
# - Haunt: Keep on cooldown for Apex Talent procs
# - Unstable Affliction: Main shard spender
# - Seed of Corruption: AoE damage in Mythic+
# - Malevolence: Hellcaller cooldown, use with Darkglare
# - Summon Darkglare: Major burst, pool 3-5 shards first
# - Drain Soul: Execute damage + shard generation
# - Shadow Bolt: Filler, use Nightfall procs immediately

================================================================================
# STAT PRIORITIES
# PvE ST: Crit > Haste = Mastery > Versatility
# PvE AoE: Haste = Crit > Mastery > Versatility  
# PvP: Intellect > Versatility > Haste > Crit > Mastery
